description: CompositionLight grey Basketball shorts made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has navy blue mesh strips on the sides, wide elasticated waistband with a drawstring and navy blue mesh on the reversible side with grey strips on the sidesFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryBuilt with the breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike basketball shorts comes in a reversible design. This high-performance short created from Dri-Fit fabric wicks sweat away from the body to keep you cool, dry and comfortable. Team it with tees and basketball shoes.
